title: 52cc 49cc 43cc Brush Cutter Carburetor Kit with Gasket, Hose, Spark Plug and Petrol Filter
features: 【Product material】: Using high quality alloy materials, more robust and durable.
【Applicable models】: Suitable for 52cc 49cc 43cc lawn mower carburetor, chainsaw carburetor, irrigation machine carburetor and other equipment with 31mm fixed hole pitch.
【Package includes】: 1x carburettor + 1x gasket + 2x starter pump + 1x fuel filter hose + 2 valves + 1 spark plug + 1 extra fuel filter.
【Product Features】:lawn mower carburetor is developed and improved by E-RFSEY, which is more fuel efficient, environmentally friendly and easier to start than other products.

【After-sales service】:If you encounter any problems during purchase or installation, please write to us in time, we will solve it for you immediately, and you can choose from other accessories in the shop.
description: Product Description Specification: Item type: carburetor Material: Aluminium, ABS Weight: approx. 135 g / 4.76 oz Color: As shown Suitable for: 52cc 49cc 43cc motor 40-5 g lawnmower 44-5 watering mowers 48d floor drill 430, 520 and other models Package list: Kit includes gasket, hose, spark plug and fuel filter Features: High-quality material: made of high-quality aluminium alloy and ABS, the carburettor is strong, durable and has a long service life. The applicability: the mower carburettor is suitable for MP15 15 mm 1E40 5 engine for 43cc 52cc mower, you can use it to meet your individual needs .Exquisire. ite workmanship: the aluminium alloy is of exquisite workmanship and with the help of high precision, the carburettor can provide good performance for your mower. Stable performance: the carburettor of the brush cutter is the perfect accessory for your garden and can effectively extend the life of your mower. Replacement bar: The ABS carburettor is stable and fits perfectly with your mower, you can use it to replace old or damaged parts.
